lines.english: O Nanak, the Lord's devotees are blessed with glorious greatness. ||4||24||
The Perfect Guru has fashioned His perfect fashion.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਸੰਚਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur kaa darasan sanchahu har dhan |1|
lines.english: Beholding the Blessed Vision of the Guru's Darshan, I have gathered the wealth of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਤਮ ਮਤਿ ਮੇਰੈ ਰਿਦੈ ਤੂੰ ਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: aootam mat merai ridai toon aau |
lines.english: O sublime understanding, come, enter into my mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਬਨਾਵਹੁ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad banaavahu ihu man |
lines.english: I have shaped this mind in the mold of the Guru's Word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਆਵਉ ਗਾਵਉ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦਾ ਅਤਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਮੋਹਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਨਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhiaavau gaavau gun govindaa at preetam mohi laagai naau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: that I may meditate and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe, and love so dearly the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||
I am satisfied and satiated by the True Name.
Joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, my understanding is refined. ||3||
I recognize that the One Creator is contained in all.
My cleansing bath at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage is the dust of the Saints. ||2||
The Guru has given this gift to Nanak. ||4||25||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:
I have become the servant of all; I have renounced my ego and pride.
Thus my evil-mindedness, which kept me far from Him, has been removed. ||1||
My intellect has been enlightened, and my understanding is perfect.
Such are the Teachings which I have received from the Guru;

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂਡਤ ਘੋਰ ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਮਹਿ ਨਿਕਸਿਓ ਮੇਰੇ ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: booddat ghor andh koop meh nikasio mere bhaaee re |1| rahaau |
lines.english: while I was drowning in the pitch black well, I was saved, O my Siblings of Destiny. ||1||Pause||
The Guru is the boat to cross over the totally unfathomable ocean of fire;
He is treasure of jewels. ||2||
This ocean of Maya is dark and treacherous.
The Perfect Guru has revealed the way to cross over it. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਪ ਤਾਪ ਕਛੁ ਉਕਤਿ ਨ ਮੋਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaap taap kachh ukat na moree |
lines.english: I do not have the ability to chant or practice intense meditation.
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl, Thi-Padhay:
Guru Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary. ||4||26||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਵਤ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har ras peevat sad hee raataa |
lines.english: One who drinks in the Lord's sublime essence is forever imbued with it,

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਰਸਾ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: aan rasaa khin meh leh jaataa |
lines.english: while other essences wear off in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਕੇ ਮਾਤੇ ਮਨਿ ਸਦਾ ਅਨੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: har ras ke maate man sadaa anand |
lines.english: Intoxicated with the Lord's sublime essence, the mind is forever in ecstasy.
One who drinks in the Lord's sublime essence, is intoxicated and enraptured;
Other essences bring only anxiety. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਰਸਾ ਸਭਿ ਹੋਛੇ ਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aan rasaa sabh hochhe re |1| rahaau |
lines.english: all other essences have no effect. ||1||Pause||
One may spend thousands and millions, but it cannot be purchased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਕੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har ras kee keemat kahee na jaae |
lines.english: The value of the Lord's sublime essence cannot be described.
The Lord's sublime essence permeates the homes of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਤ ਊਤ ਕਤ ਛੋਡਿ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eet aoot kat chhodd na jaae |
lines.english: Here and hereafter, it does not leave him.
He alone obtains it, who is so pre-ordained. ||2||
Tasting it, Nanak is wonder-struck.
Through the Guru, Nanak has obtained this taste.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਿਟਾਵੈ ਛੁਟਕੈ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਅਪੁਨੀ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh mohu mittaavai chhuttakai duramat apunee dhaaree |
lines.english: If she renounces and eliminates her sexual desire, anger, greed and attachment, and her evil-mindedness and self-conceit as well;
Nanak is imbued and enraptured with the Lord's subtle essence. ||3||27||
Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਸੇਵ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਤਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hoe nimaanee sev kamaaveh taa preetam hoveh man piaaree |1|
lines.english: and if, becoming humble, she serves Him, then she becomes dear to her Beloved's Heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਭੂਖ ਮਿਟੈ ਤੇਰੋ ਸਹਸਾ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਤੂੰ ਸੁਖਮਨਿ ਨਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dookh bhookh mittai tero sahasaa sukh paaveh toon sukhaman naaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Your pain, hunger and doubt shall vanish, and you shall obtain peace, O happy soul-bride. ||1||Pause||
Listen, O beautiful soul-bride: By the Word of the Holy Saint, you shall be saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਪਖਾਰਿ ਕਰਉ ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਆਤਮ ਸੁਧੁ ਬਿਖੁ ਤਿਆਸ ਨਿਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: charan pakhaar krau gur sevaa aatam sudh bikh tiaas nivaaree |
lines.english: Washing the Guru's feet, and serving Him, the soul is sanctified, and the thirst for sin is quenched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸਨ ਕੀ ਹੋਇ ਦਾਸਿ ਦਾਸਰੀ ਤਾ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਹਰਿ ਦੁਆਰੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: daasan kee hoe daas daasaree taa paaveh sobhaa har duaaree |2|
lines.english: If you become the slave of the slave of the Lord's slaves, then you shall obtain honor in the Court of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੀ ਅਚਾਰ ਇਹੀ ਬਿਉਹਾਰਾ ਆਗਿਆ ਮਾਨਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਹੋਇ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: eihee achaar ihee biauhaaraa aagiaa maan bhagat hoe tumaaree |
lines.english: This is right conduct, and this is the correct lifestyle, to obey the Command of the Lord's Will; this is your devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਇਹੁ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਉਤਾਰੀ ॥੩॥੨੮॥
lines.translit: jo ihu mantru kamaavai naanak so bhaujal paar utaaree |3|28|
lines.english: One who practices this Mantra, O Nanak, swims across the terrifying world-ocean. ||3||28||
